Danny and Myriam go shopping for clothes on sale.
Danny doesn't have a very clear idea of what he wants to buy.
Myriam suggests that he try different stores.
Danny comes out of one dressing room clothed in a very extravagant way.
Seeing himself in the mirror, he says to Myriam:
“I don't like these clothes.”
They decide to move on to the next store.

Sentence:
Grace and Thomas work on the same floor. 
An important investor is coming to the office today.
Thomas is tasked with organizing the conference room. 
He asks Grace to assist him.
She sets up the projector and sound system and tells him:
"We've got everything ready for the meeting."
The investor arrives some time later.

Sentence:
Cynthia and Leah sing together in the opera. 
On the night of the premiere, they meet at the theatre. 
The performance is completely sold out tonight. 
A stage manager checks with them about their costume changes.
They warm up their voices backstage and Cynthia says:
"We should go over the final song one more time." 
The show begins exactly on time.
